visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy black and white hat and a purple knit cardigan over a light green top, stands in a large warehouse-style retail environment. Behind her are tall stacks of red boxes and rows of cylindrical tins in blue, green, and red. She smiles and gestures enthusiastically with both hands toward the products. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a large warehouse. (2) The camera zooms in as the woman picks up a blue cylindrical tin featuring a snowy winter scene with houses and skaters. She points out a significant dent on the side of the tin with her right hand while holding it with her left. Her expression remains engaged and informative. (3) The woman puts down the blue tin and picks up a green version. She turns the tin over to show the bottom and uses her fingers to wind a mechanical mechanism. She then holds the tin upright, smiling at the camera as she demonstrates its function. (4) A close-up shot focuses on three tins—green, blue, and red—standing side-by-side on a shelf. The tins are rotating slowly, showcasing the winter illustrations through a transparent window. (5) The shot returns to a medium view of the woman standing by the massive display of tins and boxes, continuing to talk and gesture toward the colorful products as the video concludes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 一次擁有. [Variety]: 音樂盒 + 奶油餅乾. (2) [Subtitle]: 349元 這麼大一桶. (3) [Subtitle]: 然後還有三個顏色 我覺得藍色很漂亮. (4) [Subtitle]: 對 大家要挑一下 因為有些鐵盒. (5) [Subtitle]: 像這個 我來的時候發現他已經被凹爆了. (6) [Subtitle]: 但很可愛 小朋友應該會喜歡. (7) [Subtitle]: 也有餅乾喔 耶~. (8) [Subtitle]: 哇~. [Slogan]: Holiday Winter Wonderland.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 distant blurred figure in the background aisle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a fuzzy grey/black/white patterned hat, a lavender purple button-up knit cardigan, and a lime green shirt underneath.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large-scale warehouse store with high industrial shelving units and pallets stacked with merchandise. Visible items include red boxed sets and rows of decorative holiday cookie tins.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high arousal and a bright, friendly tone. The acoustic environment has a subtle warehouse reverb. A soft, tinkling music box melody in a major key begins playing immediately. (2) A sharp mechanical winding sound is heard as the speaker continues her rapid narration. The music box melody maintains a steady tempo of about 85 BPM. (3) The vocal intensity rises as the speaker expresses excitement. A brief metallic clink occurs as she handles the tin objects. The music box melody becomes more prominent as it is held closer to the microphone. (4) The music box melody plays through a clear phrase with high spectral brightness from the Glockenspiel-like tones. The speaker's voice remains constant in the foreground with high articulation clarity. (5) The speaker concludes with a playful 'Yay' and a slight laugh, while the music box melody continues to ring out until the very end of the track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Detailed Showcase -> Experience -> Closing
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend a specific holiday-themed cookie tin music box available at Costco, highlighting its price, features, and aesthetic appeal while providing practical shopping advice regarding product condition.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights the price, store location (Costco), and features of a specific product with the intent to share a shopping find.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video features high-energy social media editing with frequent cuts and on-screen variety text to maintain viewer engagement. The combination of live warehouse audio and the featured product's own music creates a realistic and persuasive shopping vlog atmosphere.
